schemes.benefit_en: Cashless health treatment up to Rs 5 lakh for serious diseases
schemes.benefit_hi: गंभीर बीमारियों के लिए ₹5 लाख तक कैशलेस इलाज
schemes.eligibility: Gujarat BPL families and lower-middle income groups

schemes.benefit_en: Daytime (5am-9pm) electricity supply to farmers for irrigation
schemes.benefit_hi: किसानों को सिंचाई के लिए दिन में बिजली (5AM-9PM)

schemes.benefit_en: Single portal for 60+ agriculture schemes, subsidies on inputs

schemes.name_en: Pandit Deen Dayal Upadhyay Awas Yojana
schemes.benefit_en: Housing for SC/ST/OBC families with Rs 1.2 lakh state grant
schemes.benefit_hi: SC/ST/OBC परिवारों को ₹1.2 लाख राज्य अनुदान
schemes.eligibility: SC/ST/OBC BPL families in Gujarat without pucca house

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 12,000 in two installments for pregnant women's nutrition
schemes.benefit_hi: गर्भवती महिलाओं को पोषण के लिए ₹12,000 दो किस्तों में
schemes.eligibility: Pregnant women in Gujarat (1st and 2nd child)
